action_text: Type "Incidents by agent" into the list Search field
rationale: We need to find the report by title within the Reports View/Run list; using the page’s Search field will quickly filter to "Incidents by agent".
The desired report may be a shared/global report, not in "My reports"; switching to the Global tab broadens the list to likely include it.
If the report is shared within the group, switching to the Group tab can reveal it.

action_text: Press Enter in the list Search field to apply the filter
rationale: After entering text in the list Search field, pressing Enter ensures the filter is applied if it doesn’t auto-filter.

action_text: Click the Title column header to sort by title
rationale: If searching is unreliable, sorting by Title helps manually locate the "Incidents by agent" report alphabetically.
